case_title: NANCY WRIGHT VS. MERCY MEDICAL CENTER MERCED et al

OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S DEMURRER TO PLTF'S FIRRST AMENDED COMPLT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, NANCY
REPLY MEMO TO PLTF'S OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC  HELTHCARE WEST, ALSO SUED AS MERCED MEDICAL CENTER MERCED, DOMINICAN COMMUNITY)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-13-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC)'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 26, 2012 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF HER OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM MARCH 14 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-26-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH'S (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST ALSO SUED AS MERCY MEDICAL CENTER MERCED, DOMINICAN COMMUNITY) DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION AND SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THAT THE DEMURRER SHOULD BE GRANTED AT TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION DOES NOT ALLEGE SUFFICIENT FACTS FOR A STATUTORY ELDER ABUSE CLAIMS, BUT PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN LEAVE TO DO SO. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
ORDER ON DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH'S DEMURRER TI FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-27-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-15-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO FILE AND SERVE ORDER RE DEMURRER AS TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY MEDICAL CENTER MERCED DOMINICAN COMMUNITY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC  HELTHCARE WEST, ALSO SUED AS MERCED MEDICAL CENTER MERCED, DOMINICAN COMMUNITY) HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC  HELTHCARE WEST, ALSO SUED AS MERCED MEDICAL CENTER MERCED, DOMINICAN COMMUNITY)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-15-2012 CONTINUED TO AUG-01-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOS TO DEFT'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT; POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, NANCY
REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC  HELTHCARE WEST, ALSO SUED AS MERCED MEDICAL CENTER MERCED, DOMINICAN COMMUNITY)
DECLARATION OF MICHELLE HUCKABY PROCESS SUPERVISOR AT ATTORNEY'S DIVERSIFIED RE PLAINTIFF NANCY WRIGHT'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH'S DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, NANCY

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST'S) DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 29, 2012 AND NOTICE WAS WAIVED BY THE PARTIES. COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; COURT REPORTER: TEANNA L. WARD, CSR NO. 119118
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH'S EMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS TO STATE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO CONSTITUTE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ELDER ABUSE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ALLEGE ANY RECKLESS, OPPRESSIVE, FRAUDULENT, OR MALICIOUS CONDUCT BY DEFENDANT AS REQUIRED BY WELFARE & INSTITUTIONS CODE 15657, AND IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT PLAINTIFF CAN CURE THE DEFICIENCY. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER BY EMAIL TO THE COURT TODAY. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-29-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER ON DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST)'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-01-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-05-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) AS TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTE: FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION REMAINS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) AS TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE SEP-05-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, NANCY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-16-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-16-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Continued To Sep-05-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andela K. Cicala, Esq., of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith, Tel. 415.362.2580, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Brenda Pannell, Esq., of the Law Offices of Brenda J. Pannell, Tel. 310.461.1931, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH'S EMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend. The second cause of action fails to state facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action for elder abuse. Plaintiff failed to allege any reckless, oppressive, fraudulent, or malicious conduct by Defendant as required by Welfare & Institutions Code 15657, and it does not appear that Plaintiff can cure the deficiency. Defendant's counsel to submit a proposed order by email to the court today. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Continued To Jun-29-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES -ATTY. BRENDA J. PANNELL, TEL. NO. (310) 461-1931 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. ANGELE K. CICALA OF LEWISS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH, TEL. NO. 262-8548 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST'S) DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 29, 2012 AND NOTICE WAS WAIVED BY THE PARTIES. COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 = (302/JJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2012 Continued To Aug-01-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Continued To Jun-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRENDA PANNELL, TEL. NO. (310) 461-1931 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH'S (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST ALSO SUED AS MERCY MEDICAL CENTER MERCED, DOMINICAN COMMUNITY) DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend as to the second cause of action and sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the third cause of action. Plaintiff concedes that the demurrer should be granted at to the second cause of action. The third cause of action does not allege sufficient facts for a statutory elder abuse claims, but plaintiff is given leave to do so. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Continued To Mar-26-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH (FORMERLY KNOWN AS CATHOLIC)'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is
Continued on the court's own motion to March 26, 2012 to give plaintiff an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must provide courtesy copies of her opposition papers to department 302 no later than 4pm March 14 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Continued To Apr-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
